name: IRS Notice Generation & Routine Correspondence

absorption.reasoning: IRS hiring restraint after FY2024 staffing recalibration. Notice generation automation reduces need for manual correspondence drafting; vacated routine correspondence positions not backfilled.

volume.source: IRS Data Book FY2023: ~200M pieces of correspondence (math-error, balance-due, identity-verification, routine response notices)
